description: Provides insights into Grafana itself via internal metrics

panels.description: Build info for this Grafana instance
panels.title: Grafana Build Info

panels.description: Number of times the container has restarted since the pod was created
panels.title: Restarts

panels.description: Lists the running versions for this instance.
panels.title: Grafana Plugins

panels.description: Number of times Grafana has been oomkilled over the dashboard range
panels.title: OOMKills

panels.description: The number of seconds taken to send notifications for firing and resolved alerts. This metric lets you observe slow or over-utilized integrations, such as an SMTP server that is being given emails faster than it can send them
panels.title: Alerting Notification Latency
Plugin Request Tail Latencies By Endpoint (q0.99)

panels.description: Shows raw network tx/rx from the instance pod(s). Transmit is positive, Receive is negative, in order to visually separate.
panels.title: Instance network traffic

targets.legendFormat: Time spent waiting for a connection

panels.description: Lists the closed DB connections (per second) from Grafana to the Instance DB server, and the reasons why they were closed.
panels.title: Closed DB Connections

panels.description: Lists the _total_ open/idle DB connections from Grafana to the Instance DB server. Note that this is a `sum`.
panels.title: Open/Idle DB Connections
Time waiting for blocked DB connections

targets.expr:
max(rate(redis_keyspace_hits_total{namespace="$namespace", container!="redis-alerting-server-exporter"}[5m])) by (namespace, container)
/
(
max(rate(redis_keyspace_misses_total{namespace="$namespace", container!="redis-alerting-server-exporter"}[5m])) by (namespace, container)
+
max(rate(redis_keyspace_hits_total{namespace="$namespace", container!="redis-alerting-server-exporter"}[5m])) by (namespace, container)
)

panels.title: Query Cache Hit Ratio by Datasource

title: Grafana internal metrics
